title: Zelda 2 NES Attack 1 Challenge 13/13!!!
description:
Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/haldanghor
Attack 1 Challenge Part 1- http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-lj_ltnUZEc&list=SPQcCb8krfV8nWcFbZYyUh1SwXwigkcxJ4

Original Game Part 1- http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ck9ylWXa6bw&feature=autoplay&list=PL9C29D2B5633AF91B&lf=view_all&playnext=14

I had it in my mind for a very long time and finally, I decided to try my luck into this one! Another Zelda 2 run! But this time, no grinding at the beginning to show everything in the game. I just charge into the game as quick as possible without any attack level, which is very challenging, but adds so much to the fun. People were used to see me do pretty well and not getting hit that much, but this mode changes everything! You'll see me struggle a lot more than usual, but it forced me to use every trick in my arsenal and I hope it pleases the viewers very much!
